slimeRngCodes.title: Slime RNG Codes
slimeRngCodes.intro: Redeem Slime RNG codes after the short tutorial, then use the rewards during longer roll sessions for faster slime collection, better luck windows, and stronger early progress.

workingCodes.bestFor: Extra rolling value and faster early progression

workingCodes.reward: Ultra Luck Boost, Roll Speed Boost, and 4 Apples
workingCodes.bestFor: Luck farming, roll speed, and slime XP

workingCodes.reward: Luck Boost, Roll Speed Boost, and 6 Apples
workingCodes.bestFor: Stacking boosts before a longer rolling session

redeemSteps.title: Launch Slime RNG
redeemSteps.description: Open the Slime RNG Roblox experience and finish the short tutorial.

redeemSteps.title: Open the Shop
redeemSteps.description: Select the Shop button on the right side of the screen.

redeemSteps.title: Find the code box
redeemSteps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the Shop menu and locate the code entry field.

redeemSteps.title: Enter and redeem
redeemSteps.description: Type the Slime RNG code exactly as shown, then press Redeem to claim the reward.

tips: Slime RNG codes are case-sensitive, so copy capital letters and punctuation exactly.
Use roll speed and luck rewards when you can stay active for a longer session.
Slime RNG codes belong to this Roblox experience and are separate from other slime-themed games.

slimeRngBeginnerGuide.title: Slime RNG Beginner Guide
slimeRngBeginnerGuide.intro: Slime RNG starts with rolling, equipping, fighting, earning Coins, and buying upgrades in a clear order. The strongest beginner path is to automate rolls, improve roll speed, unlock zones, scale enemy count, and prepare for Goop before your first rebirth.

steps.title: Roll your first slimes
steps.description: Roll a few Slime RNG slimes and equip the best units you get so your team can defeat enemies and start earning Coins.

steps.title: Look for Fin early
steps.description: Fin is a standout early Slime RNG damage option and should be leveled before weaker starter slimes.

steps.title: Buy Auto Roll for 200 Coins
steps.goal: Remove manual rolling from the main loop.
steps.description: Auto Roll keeps the Slime RNG rolling loop active and is the first major quality-of-life purchase.

steps.title: Upgrade Roll Speed
steps.description: Roll Speed improves how often you can roll, which makes every Slime RNG boost window more valuable.

steps.title: Unlock the next zone
steps.description: Move into stronger Slime RNG zones once your team can keep pace instead of over-farming the starting area.

steps.title: Prioritize Enemy Count
steps.description: Enemy Count is a major Slime RNG upgrade because more enemies means more kills and more Coins when your team has enough damage.

steps.title: Feed fruits to your best slimes
steps.goal: Turn Apples and other fruit into useful power.
steps.description: Put Slime RNG fruit rewards into your strongest slimes instead of spreading XP across weak units.

steps.title: Reach 10,000,000 Coins for Goop
steps.description: Goop unlocks after a 10,000,000 Coin investment and becomes the Slime RNG bridge into rebirth growth.

steps.title: Rebirth when ready
steps.description: Slime RNG rebirths reset Coins and zone access while keeping major long-term progress such as slimes, consumables, upgrades, and luck gains.

steps.title: Join the Stouts Studio group
steps.description: Joining the Stouts Studio Roblox group gives Slime RNG players a permanent +1 Luck bonus.

quickTips: Buy Slime RNG Auto Roll before chasing expensive luck upgrades.
Roll Speed improves every code reward that boosts rolling sessions.
Keep your best Slime RNG damage dealer leveled so new zones feel smooth.
Save long boost windows for sessions where you can roll and fight actively.

slimeRngTierList.title: Slime RNG Tier List
slimeRngTierList.intro: The Slime RNG tier list ranks slimes by practical value, damage, speed, utility, and progression impact. Void Slime is the ultimate chase target, Huge variants dominate late-game play, Orca and Lucky Slime carry mid-game farming, and Fin is the best early damage target.

tiers.summary: Ultimate Slime RNG chase tier for the strongest known slime power.

slimes.name: Void Slime
slimes.notes: The top long-term Slime RNG collection and combat goal.

tiers.summary: Late-game Slime RNG meta tier built around Huge variants and valuable utility.

slimes.name: Huge Spike
slimes.notes: One of the highest DPS Slime RNG targets with piercing attacks.

slimes.name: Huge Rocky
slimes.notes: A massive Slime RNG area-damage option for late-game zone pushing.

slimes.name: Huge Lucky
slimes.notes: A premier Slime RNG luck support pick for rare slime hunting.

tiers.summary: Strong Slime RNG mid-game tier for stable farming teams.

slimes.name: Orca
slimes.notes: Excellent Slime RNG DPS once your early team is ready to scale.

slimes.name: Lucky Slime
slimes.notes: A Slime RNG support unit for rare-drop farming and long roll sessions.

tiers.summary: Useful Slime RNG early-to-mid game slimes that bridge progression.

slimes.name: Spike
slimes.notes: A fast Slime RNG attacker for early combat and enemy clearing.

slimes.name: Fin
slimes.notes: The best early Slime RNG DPS target and a smart first slime to level.

slimes.name: Rocky
slimes.notes: A sturdy Slime RNG option when survivability matters.

tiers.summary: Starter Slime RNG baseline tier before stronger slimes arrive.

slimes.name: Basic Slime
slimes.notes: A temporary Slime RNG unit for the very beginning.

slimeRngSlimeCollection.title: Slime RNG Slime Collection
slimeRngSlimeCollection.intro: Slime RNG collection is about rolling, equipping, leveling, and replacing slimes as your account grows. Use this database to decide which Slime RNG slimes are worth keeping, feeding, and building around.

slimes.name: Fin
slimes.description: The best Slime RNG early damage dealer and a smart first leveling target.
slimes.recommendedUse: Level early and use as your first reliable DPS slime.

slimes.name: Basic Slime
slimes.description: The standard Slime RNG starter slime with low individual power and easy availability.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use until better early-game slimes appear.

slimes.name: Green Slime
slimes.description: A balanced Slime RNG slime with a mix of damage and health.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use as a temporary team filler before stronger DPS or utility slimes.

slimes.name: Rocky
slimes.description: A sturdy Slime RNG slime with higher health and slower damage output.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use in defensive setups when survivability matters.

slimes.name: Spike
slimes.description: A sharp Slime RNG attacker with higher damage and faster attacks than basic slimes.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use for faster enemy clearing before rare and Huge slimes take over.

slimes.name: Water Slime
slimes.description: A flexible Slime RNG slime with moderate stats.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use as an early-game slot when your team needs stable options.

slimes.name: Fire Slime
slimes.description: A fiery Slime RNG slime that adds burn-style pressure.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use when longer fights benefit from extra damage over time.

slimes.name: Ice Slime
slimes.description: A Slime RNG utility slime that slows enemy momentum.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use when control is more useful than raw damage.

slimes.name: Orca
slimes.description: A powerful Slime RNG mid-game slime with excellent carry value.
slimes.recommendedUse: Prioritize leveling once obtained because it can carry progression.

slimes.name: Lucky Slime
slimes.description: A rare Slime RNG slime built around luck support.
slimes.recommendedUse: Equip during rare farming and longer roll sessions.

slimes.name: Huge Rocky
slimes.description: An enormous Slime RNG Rocky variant with strong area damage.
slimes.recommendedUse: Keep as a late-game anchor for farming and zone pushing.

slimes.name: Huge Spike
slimes.description: A colossal Slime RNG Spike variant with high damage and piercing attacks.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use as one of the strongest damage-focused Huge variant targets.

slimes.name: Huge Lucky
slimes.description: A top Slime RNG luck booster for rare slime hunting.
slimes.recommendedUse: Use during rare-hunting sessions and late-game collection goals.

slimes.name: Void Slime
slimes.description: The ultimate Slime RNG chase slime with unmatched long-term value.
slimes.recommendedUse: Treat as the ultimate collection goal.

collectionTips: Feed Slime RNG fruit rewards to the slimes you actually use.
Keep luck-focused Slime RNG units ready for rare-hunting sessions.
Replace starter slimes once your rare or Huge variants can carry fights.

slimeRngRebirthGuide.title: Slime RNG Rebirth Guide
slimeRngRebirthGuide.subtitle: Rebirth at the right time and turn Goop into permanent luck.
slimeRngRebirthGuide.intro: Slime RNG Rebirth is the main mid-to-late game reset system. It resets your run economy, but gives you a permanent luck multiplier that makes future slime hunting much faster.
slimeRngRebirthGuide.strategyNote: The strongest Slime RNG rebirth rhythm is to rebuild your coin engine, unlock Goop, farm enough for the next cycle, and rebirth once the permanent luck gain is worth more than staying in a slow zone.

items.title: Reach the 10,000,000 Coin Gate
items.description: Before Slime RNG rebirth becomes realistic, focus on reaching the 10M Coins requirement that unlocks Goop earning. Early spending should prioritize income speed over pure luck upgrades.
keyPoints: Coins are used for Slime RNG rolling, upgrades, and zone unlocks.
The Slime RNG Goop mechanic unlocks after spending exactly 10,000,000 Coins.
Enemy Count and stronger zones usually matter more than Luck before this threshold.

items.title: Farm Goop After the Unlock
items.description: Goop is the Slime RNG prestige currency used for rebirthing. Once it is unlocked, farm it consistently instead of staying in low-value coin loops.
keyPoints: Goop is rare compared with Coins.
Goop is used for Slime RNG Rebirth rather than normal early-game upgrades.
Zone 3 and later zones are practical starting points for Slime RNG Goop farming.

items.title: Know What Slime RNG Rebirth Resets
items.description: A Slime RNG rebirth resets your coin balance and locks zones again, so your next run starts from the beginning economically.
keyPoints: Slime RNG zones need to be unlocked again.
The reset is offset by a permanent luck multiplier boost.

items.title: Know What Slime RNG Rebirth Keeps
items.description: Slime RNG Rebirth is powerful because it does not erase your whole account. Your retained collection helps you rebuild much faster on the next cycle.
keyPoints: You keep your Slime RNG slimes.
Strong Huge or Shiny slimes can carry the next Slime RNG cycle through early zones quickly.

items.title: Rebirth Early When Goop Is Ready
items.description: The recommended Slime RNG pivot is to rebirth once you have enough Goop instead of overfarming a stagnant zone. Early rebirths create multiplier jumps that make the following run more efficient.
keyPoints: Slime RNG rebirth multipliers compound over multiple cycles.
A multiplier jump can make rare slime hunting much faster.
Waiting too long in a weak farming zone slows overall Slime RNG progression.

items.title: Stack Slime RNG Rebirth With Free Luck
items.description: Permanent luck becomes much stronger when combined with the Stouts Studio group bonus and other Slime RNG luck sources.
keyPoints: The Stouts Studio group bonus gives Slime RNG players a permanent +1 Luck bonus.
Rebirth multipliers act as major long-term luck scaling.
Use your next Goop target to decide whether another Slime RNG rebirth cycle is ready.

slimeRngGoopGuide.title: Slime RNG Goop Guide
slimeRngGoopGuide.subtitle: Unlock, farm, and spend Goop for faster Slime RNG rebirth cycles.
slimeRngGoopGuide.intro: Goop is the currency that pushes Slime RNG from normal coin farming into rebirth progression. The 10M Coin unlock is the key mid-game bottleneck.
checklist: Reach the Slime RNG 10,000,000 Coin unlock.
Farm Zone 3 or later once your DPS can keep enemy kills steady.
Upgrade Roll Speed, Enemy Count, and Slime Slots before deep luck spending.
Save Goop for Slime RNG Rebirth instead of treating it like normal Coins.

items.question: What is Slime RNG Goop?
items.answer: Goop is Slime RNG's prestige currency. Unlike Coins, it is tied to Rebirth progression and converts a completed run into permanent long-term power.
details: Coins support Slime RNG rolling, upgrades, and zone progression.
Goop supports Slime RNG rebirth progression.
Goop bridges mid-game farming and late-game multiplier stacking.

items.question: How do you unlock Slime RNG Goop?
items.answer: Slime RNG Goop earning unlocks after spending exactly 10,000,000 Coins. This makes 10M Coins the first major progression gate for players aiming at rebirth.
details: Do not over-prioritize Luck before the 10M Coin threshold.
Focus on coin velocity through zones, Enemy Count, Roll Speed, and stronger slimes.
The faster you unlock Goop, the sooner you can start Slime RNG rebirth cycles.

items.question: Where should you farm Slime RNG Goop?
items.answer: Slime RNG Goop drops begin in Zone 3 and later zones. Zone 3 and Zone 4 are practical early Goop farming targets, while higher zones produce stronger returns with better DPS.
details: Zone 3, The Cavern, has 2,500 enemy HP and 250 Coin yield.
Zone 4, The Tundra, has 15,000 enemy HP and 1,500 Coin yield.
Higher Slime RNG zones scale sharply in both enemy HP and coin value.

items.question: Why is Slime RNG Goop connected to Rebirth?
items.answer: Goop is used for Slime RNG rebirthing, and rebirth grants permanent luck multiplier growth. This makes Goop farming the main repeatable loop for long-term progression.
details: Spend Goop through the Slime RNG rebirth system.
Use the new permanent luck multiplier to rebuild faster in the next cycle.

items.question: What should you upgrade before serious Slime RNG Goop farming?
items.answer: Prioritize upgrades that increase kill speed and income speed before going all-in on luck. A stronger farming base gets you to rebirth faster.
details: Auto Roll removes manual rolling bottlenecks.
Roll Speed increases total Slime RNG rolls over time.
Enemy Count can double income if your DPS can handle the extra enemies.
Slime Slots increase total deployed damage.

items.question: Which late-game Slime RNG upgrades help Goop farming?
items.answer: After early rebirth cycles, Goop Drop upgrades, Boss Spawns, Enemy Rush, Slime Slots, and Offline Loot become more valuable because they reduce the time between rebirths.
details: Goop Drop +10% directly improves Slime RNG Goop farming speed.
Boss Spawns can improve rewards if your team is strong enough.
Offline Loot helps maintain Slime RNG progression while away from the game.

slimeRngLuckGuide.title: Slime RNG Luck Guide
slimeRngLuckGuide.subtitle: Stack Luck the right way for rare, Shiny, and Huge Slime RNG targets.
slimeRngLuckGuide.intro: Luck is one of the most important stats in Slime RNG, but buying luck too early can slow your first rebirth. Build income first, unlock Goop, rebirth for permanent multipliers, then stack active luck sources for serious rare-slime hunting.

items.title: Understand What Slime RNG Luck Changes
items.description: Luck improves the chance of rolling rare outcomes by reducing the effective odds of rare slimes. Strong Slime RNG luck multipliers turn long hunts into practical goals.
items.bestFor: Understanding rare slime probability before spending resources

items.title: Get the Free Slime RNG Baseline Bonus
items.description: Start with the free Luck bonus tied to the official Slime RNG community or game-page action. Additive Luck becomes much stronger once rebirth multipliers are applied.

items.title: Prioritize Income Before Slime RNG Luck
items.description: Before the 10M Coin Goop unlock, Roll Speed, Enemy Count, stronger zones, and better DPS usually matter more than stacking Luck.

items.title: Use Slime RNG Rebirth as the Main Luck Engine
items.description: Rebirth adds permanent luck multiplier growth, making each future cycle stronger. Early rebirth jumps can speed up rare slime hunting dramatically.

items.title: Add Super Luck and Ultra Luck Later
items.description: Super Luck and Ultra Luck become more valuable after rebirth multipliers are active. Direct Luck increases compound harder once permanent multipliers are already strong.
items.bestFor: Post-rebirth farming and rare slime hunting

items.title: Use Slime RNG Lucky Slime Effects
items.description: Lucky Slime provides a passive luck role, while Huge Lucky is a top-tier variant with a 3x Luck multiplier. These effects are valuable when hunting Shiny, Huge, or Mythic-tier slimes.
items.bestFor: Late-game slime collection and high-rarity rolling

items.title: Time Slime RNG Luck Boosts Around Active Rolling
items.description: Luck potions from codes and rewards are best used when you are actively rolling, have strong roll speed, and can sustain enough income to keep the hunting session efficient.
items.bestFor: Boost windows, code rewards, and focused rare-hunting sessions

slimeRngHugeSlimesGuide.title: Slime RNG Huge Slimes Guide
slimeRngHugeSlimesGuide.subtitle: Huge Slimes, Shiny Slimes, and the best Slime RNG late-game variants.
slimeRngHugeSlimesGuide.intro: Slime RNG Huge Slimes are ultra-rare mutated variants with massive combat value. Huge Rocky, Huge Spike, and Huge Lucky are especially important for late-game pushing, farming, and rare-slime hunting.

items.name: Shiny Variant
items.description: A Shiny Slime has improved stats and a unique visual aura. It is rarer than a standard Slime RNG slime and becomes especially valuable when attached to strong base slime types.
items.recommendedUse: Keep and level strong Shiny variants instead of treating them as normal collection fillers.

items.name: Huge Variant
items.description: A Huge Slime has a massive damage multiplier and expanded area impact. Huge variants are among the most important Slime RNG upgrades for late-game zone pushing and faster farming.
items.recommendedUse: Prioritize Huge variants when building a team for high-HP zones and Goop farming.

items.name: Huge Shiny
items.description: Huge Shiny combines the Huge and Shiny outcomes, making it one of the rarest and strongest Slime RNG variant types.
items.recommendedUse: Treat as an endgame chase target and build around it when rolled on a strong slime type.

items.name: Huge Rocky
items.description: Huge Rocky is an enormous Rocky variant with a massive damage multiplier and expanded area impact. It is an S-Tier Slime RNG late-game slime.
items.recommendedUse: Use for stable late-game farming when you need durability, area pressure, and steady zone clearing.

items.name: Huge Spike
items.description: Huge Spike is a colossal Spike variant with devastating Slime RNG damage. Its piercing attacks make it a strong damage-focused pick.
items.recommendedUse: Use for aggressive farming, boss-style targets, and zones where raw damage matters more than utility.

items.name: Huge Lucky
items.description: Huge Lucky is one of the best Slime RNG luck boosters with a 3x Luck multiplier. It is one of the most valuable slimes for rare-slime hunting.
items.recommendedUse: Equip during focused rare, Shiny, Huge, and Mythic hunting sessions to improve long-term collection efficiency.

items.name: Void Slime
items.description: Void Slime is a Mythic-tier Slime RNG slime with unmatched power and game-changing unique abilities. It is not a Huge variant, but it represents the kind of target late-game luck stacking is built around.
items.recommendedUse: Use Huge Lucky, rebirth multipliers, and active luck boosts when pushing toward Mythic-tier hunting goals.

tips: Slime RNG Huge variants are worth keeping even when their base slime is not your usual favorite.
Huge Lucky is a strong support target for rare hunting because its value is tied to Luck rather than only damage.
Huge Shiny outcomes are endgame collection goals and should be protected from accidental replacement.

slimeRngVoidSlimeGuide.title: Slime RNG Void Slime Guide
slimeRngVoidSlimeGuide.subtitle: Void Slime is the Mythic-tier chase slime and a top-end Slime RNG collection goal.
slimeRngVoidSlimeGuide.intro: Void Slime sits at the top of the Slime RNG progression ladder as an SSS-tier Mythic slime. With listed odds of 1 in 10,000,000, players should treat it as a late-game target built around high roll volume, Rebirth luck multipliers, and strong farming efficiency.

items.title: Slime RNG Void Slime Overview
items.summary: Void Slime is a Mythic rarity slime with unmatched late-game power and game-changing unique abilities. It is positioned above Huge Spike, Huge Rocky, Huge Lucky, Orca, and Lucky Slime in the Slime RNG tier list.

items.title: Slime RNG Listed Roll Odds
items.searchIntent: void slime, mythic slime, rarest slime
items.summary: Void Slime is the rarest confirmed Slime RNG target in the current slime database. Its odds make it a long-term collection goal, so players should focus on increasing total rolls instead of expecting quick results.

items.title: Why Slime RNG Players Chase Void Slime
items.summary: Void Slime combines Mythic rarity with the highest listed damage value in the current Slime RNG tier list. It works as both a prestige flex and a practical late-game power target for deep farming cycles.

items.title: Slime RNG Void Slime Preparation Path
items.summary: Before seriously hunting Void Slime, automate rolling, increase Roll Speed, push Rebirth cycles, and stack Super Luck, Ultra Luck, and permanent Rebirth multipliers. More rolls per minute and stronger Luck multipliers directly improve long-session hunting efficiency.

items.title: Slime RNG Rebirth Advantage
items.summary: Void Slime hunting becomes more efficient after Rebirth because Rebirth adds permanent Luck multiplier growth. Strong retained slimes also let players rebuild faster after each reset, creating more high-efficiency rolling windows over time.

items.title: Slime RNG Late-Game Hunting Loop
items.summary: The most efficient loop is to farm high-yield zones, unlock and farm Goop, Rebirth as soon as the next multiplier is ready, then use the stronger Luck base to roll more aggressively.

slimeRngZoneMap.title: Slime RNG Zone Map
slimeRngZoneMap.subtitle: Compare Slime RNG enemy HP, coin yield, unlock costs, and clear-speed timing.
slimeRngZoneMap.intro: Slime RNG zones scale sharply: each new area has higher enemy health but much better coin yield. Move forward when your team can clear current enemies in under 10 seconds, because moving too early slows farming while staying too long wastes income potential.

items.name: The Meadow
items.recommendation: Start here, roll basic Slime RNG slimes, equip your best team, and build enough Coins for early automation.

items.name: The Forest
items.recommendation: Move here after your starter team clears Meadow enemies quickly. This is the first meaningful Slime RNG coin-yield jump.

items.name: The Cavern
items.recommendation: Enter when Zone 2 enemies die smoothly. This is also where Slime RNG Goop farming becomes relevant after the Goop mechanic is unlocked.

items.name: The Tundra
items.recommendation: Use this as a stronger Slime RNG mid-game farming zone once your DPS can handle the HP jump without long kill times.

items.name: The Storm
items.recommendation: Push here when your Slime RNG team has enough damage and Enemy Count upgrades to keep income moving efficiently.

items.name: The Void
items.recommendation: Use this zone for serious Slime RNG late-game coin farming before higher-end unlocks. Strong Slime Slots and DPS upgrades matter here.

items.name: The Crystal Cave
items.recommendation: Farm here after your Slime RNG Rebirth cycles and retained slimes can handle multi-million HP enemies at a practical pace.

items.name: The Alien Hive
items.recommendation: This is the final listed Slime RNG zone and the top coin-yield area. Enter when your team can sustain fast kills against 35M HP enemies.

slimeRngCoinsFarmingGuide.title: Slime RNG Coins Farming Guide
slimeRngCoinsFarmingGuide.subtitle: Use DPS, automation, zone timing, and income upgrades to earn Slime RNG Coins faster.
slimeRngCoinsFarmingGuide.intro: Coins are the foundation of early and mid-game Slime RNG progression. They support rolling, upgrades, zone unlocks, and the 10,000,000 Coin Goop checkpoint. If progress slows, the bottleneck is usually DPS, zone timing, or early spending that favors Luck before income speed.

items.title: Build a Fast Slime RNG Kill Team
items.goal: Improve DPS before pushing harder zones.
actions: Equip your strongest Slime RNG slimes instead of keeping low-damage starters active.
Prioritize Fin early because it is listed as the best early-game damage dealer.
Feed fruits to your best slimes to raise XP and improve farming power.
items.why: Coins come from enemy kills, so faster kills create faster Slime RNG farming before any advanced strategy matters.

items.title: Buy Slime RNG Auto Roll Early
actions: Purchase Auto Roll for 200 Coins as an early priority.
Keep rolling while your team farms enemies in the current zone.
Use new stronger slimes to improve future DPS and zone clear speed.
items.why: Auto Roll keeps Slime RNG progression moving while you focus on upgrades, zone unlocks, and team strength.

items.title: Upgrade Slime RNG Income Before Heavy Luck Spending
actions: Prioritize Enemy Count when your team has enough DPS.
Use Roll Speed to increase total roll volume and improve the chance of useful slime upgrades over time.
Do not over-invest in Luck before your coin engine is strong.
items.why: Enemy Count can directly increase income by adding more targets, while Luck improves roll quality but does not directly generate the 10M Coins needed for Goop.

items.title: Move Slime RNG Zones by Clear Speed
items.goal: Avoid wasting time in zones that are too weak or too hard.
actions: Move to the next zone when current enemies die in under 10 seconds.
Use The Forest, The Cavern, The Tundra, The Storm, The Void, The Crystal Cave, and The Alien Hive as income jumps.
If enemies take too long to kill, stay back and upgrade DPS, Slime Slots, or Enemy Count first.
items.why: Each higher Slime RNG zone gives better coin yield, but only if your team can clear enemies fast enough.

items.title: Use Slime RNG Slime Slots to Multiply Damage
actions: Buy Slime Slots when available because more deployed slimes means more total damage.
Pair Slime Slots with stronger slimes from rolling and fruit XP investment.
Use the extra DPS to farm higher-HP zones more efficiently.
items.why: More slimes create more damage output, which shortens kill time and improves Slime RNG Coins per minute.

items.title: Treat 10M Coins as the Slime RNG Mid-Game Checkpoint
items.goal: Unlock Goop and prepare for Rebirth.
actions: Push income upgrades until you can spend 10,000,000 Coins to unlock Goop drops.
Farm zones 3 and later for Goop after the mechanic is unlocked.
Use Rebirth to gain permanent Luck multiplier growth, then repeat the farming cycle faster.
items.why: The first 10M Coin threshold unlocks the prestige economy. After Rebirth, retained slimes and permanent multipliers make later Slime RNG coin farming faster.

slimeRngUpgradesGuide.title: Slime RNG Upgrades Guide
slimeRngUpgradesGuide.subtitle: Build Slime RNG automation, roll volume, kill speed, zone access, and coin income before deep Luck spending.
slimeRngUpgradesGuide.intro: Slime RNG upgrades should follow the player's current bottleneck. If you need Coins, prioritize Auto Roll, Enemy Count, Slime Slots, and zone progression. After Goop and Rebirth cycles are active, shift into Super Luck, Ultra Luck, Goop Drop, Boss Spawns, Enemy Rush, and Offline Loot.

items.effect: Automates Slime RNG rolling after purchase.
items.useCase: Buy for 200 Coins to remove manual clicking and keep slime acquisition running while farming.

items.bestTiming: Early game and always useful later
items.effect: Increases total Slime RNG rolls over time.
items.useCase: More rolls per minute means more chances to find stronger slimes, rare slimes, and long-term chase targets.

items.bestTiming: Early to mid game, once DPS is stable
items.effect: Adds more Slime RNG enemies to farm at once.
items.useCase: Prioritize before heavy Luck spending because more targets can directly increase coin income when your team kills fast enough.

items.effect: Allows more Slime RNG slimes to fight at the same time.
items.useCase: More deployed slimes means more DPS, faster kills, better zone progression, and stronger coin farming.

items.bestTiming: After the first income base is built
items.effect: Improves rare Slime RNG slime rolling odds.
items.useCase: Buy after your coin engine is strong enough. It becomes much better when combined with Rebirth multipliers.

items.effect: Further improves rare Slime RNG slime rolling odds.
items.useCase: Use for high-end slime hunting, especially when chasing Huge variants, Mythic targets, and long-session rolling goals.

items.effect: Improves Slime RNG Goop farming efficiency by 10% per level.
items.useCase: Use this to shorten the time between Rebirth cycles, since Goop is the key prestige currency.

items.bestTiming: When your team can handle high-HP enemies
items.effect: Increases access to boss-focused Slime RNG farming opportunities.
items.useCase: Bosses have much higher health but better reward potential, so this works best after your DPS is strong.

items.bestTiming: Late game when enemy availability limits farming
items.effect: Increases Slime RNG enemy spawn rate by 25%.
items.useCase: Strong when your team kills enemies faster than they appear. It improves farming flow if DPS is already high.

items.effect: Generates scaled Slime RNG rewards while away based on current DPS.
items.useCase: Useful for maintaining progression between sessions, especially after your team and zones are already strong.
Works as a supporting Luck-related upgrade after the main income, Rebirth, and roll-speed systems are already developed.

faq.title: Slime RNG FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick Slime RNG answers for codes, slimes, luck, zones, and rebirth progress.

questions.question: What is Slime RNG?
questions.answer: Slime RNG is a Roblox RNG collector where players roll for slimes, equip a team, defeat enemy slimes, earn Coins, buy upgrades, unlock zones, and rebirth for permanent growth.

questions.question: How do Slime RNG codes work?
questions.answer: Slime RNG codes are redeemed inside the Shop code box and can grant rewards such as Coins, dice, potions, Apples, Luck boosts, and Roll Speed boosts.

questions.question: What should Slime RNG beginners buy first?
questions.answer: Slime RNG beginners should buy Auto Roll, improve Roll Speed, unlock the next zone when ready, and scale Enemy Count once their team can defeat enemies quickly.

questions.question: Who is the best early Slime RNG slime?
questions.answer: Fin is the strongest early Slime RNG target because it gives dependable starter damage and helps new players clear enemies faster.

questions.question: Why does Slime RNG rebirth matter?
questions.answer: Slime RNG rebirth converts progression into long-term multiplier gains, making later runs faster while preserving important account progress.

cta.title: Play Slime RNG Today
cta.description: Start rolling slimes, collecting rewards, building a stronger team, and pushing toward your first Slime RNG rebirth.
